gloss.en: to a position on a surface

gloss.en: the path of an object around another in space

gloss.en: neat, tidy and well organized

gloss.en: not special or unusual in any way

gloss.en: a group of people working together for a goal

gloss.en: a living thing, like a plant or animal

gloss.en: a group of people working together for a goal

words.example: He's the president of a large international organization.

gloss.en: relating to how things seem on the outside

gloss.en: working too much or too hard

gloss.en: the feeling when your body is hurt

gloss.en: a metal container used for cooking

gloss.en: to make someone unable to move

gloss.en: the regular way something happens

gloss.en: calm and without war or violence

gloss.en: having no money at all
